Источники всех вопросов: реальный Google PAA (Apify), FAQ bank и семейные шаблоны apply_seo_from_research.py. Цвет карточки = происхождение вопроса.

PAA Вопрос взят из People Also Ask (Google via Apify). Ответ написан скриптом под страницу.
Generated Вопрос из семейного шаблона (не было в PAA / добили до 5–6 FAQ).
FAQ bank Зафиксированный набор для /faq из content map.
Blocked PAA отфильтрован (Home Depot, Pella, lawsuit…).

People Also Ask Q1. How much does it cost to have a contractor replace a window?

Сгенерировано (прочее) Q4. How do I request an estimate from Deluxe Windows?
Идея / источник
Семейный fill / доп. проход — шаблон не распознан точно, но не из PAA pool
Ответ
Call, use the contact form or visit the Burlingame showroom with the project address, product type and approximate quantity; an in-home measurement is then scheduled at a convenient time.
Сгенерировано (прочее) Q5. What should I prepare before a window consultation?
Идея / источник
Семейный fill / доп. проход — шаблон не распознан точно, но не из PAA pool
Ответ
Have the property address, the number of openings, any current problems such as drafts or condensation, preferred materials or brands, and any HOA or permit constraints you already know about.

/faq Window FAQ | Bay Area Cost, Permits & Installation 6
FAQ bank / /faq hub Q1. How much does window replacement cost in the Bay Area?
Идея / источник
Вопрос из FAQ bank (content map / cost cluster) — зафиксированный ответ для /faq
Ответ
With the current promotion, quality vinyl replacement starts at $499-$549 per window installed (regular $832-$915), with fiberglass, clad-wood and architectural products higher. Window count, sizes, glass and access move the number, so quotes follow on-site measurements.
FAQ bank / /faq hub Q2. How much does it cost to replace all windows in a house?
Идея / источник
Вопрос из FAQ bank (content map / cost cluster) — зафиксированный ответ для /faq
Ответ
Whole-house pricing scales with count: industry data for 2026 shows 8-10 windows at roughly $6,400-$22,000 and 12-15 windows at $9,600-$33,000. Replacing everything at once is usually cheaper per window than phasing the work.
FAQ bank / /faq hub Q3. Do I need a permit to replace windows in the Bay Area?
Идея / источник
Вопрос из FAQ bank (content map / cost cluster) — зафиксированный ответ для /faq
Ответ
Most Bay Area cities require a permit: San Francisco requires one for every window replacement, and Oakland for any residential or commercial swap. Deluxe Windows confirms the rule for your address and files the paperwork.
FAQ bank / /faq hub Q4. How long does a window replacement project take?
Идея / источник
Вопрос из FAQ bank (content map / cost cluster) — зафиксированный ответ для /faq
Ответ
Measurement takes one visit, manufacturing typically four to eight weeks, and installation one to three working days for most homes. Larger or specialty orders, such as clad-wood or steel, can extend the manufacturing window.
FAQ bank / /faq hub Q5. Should I choose retrofit or full-frame window replacement?
Идея / источник
Вопрос из FAQ bank (content map / cost cluster) — зафиксированный ответ для /faq
Ответ
Retrofit installation keeps the existing frame and costs less, which suits sound stucco openings common in the Bay Area. Full-frame replacement removes everything to the studs and is the right call when frames show rot, leaks or previous poor installs.
FAQ bank / /faq hub Q6. Which window brands does Deluxe Windows carry?
Идея / источник
Вопрос из FAQ bank (content map / cost cluster) — зафиксированный ответ для /faq
Ответ
Deluxe Windows carries Milgard, Marvin, Andersen, Anlin, Simonton, JELD-WEN, Ply Gem, Alside, Western Window Systems, Italwindows and All Weather Architectural Aluminum, so budget and premium projects can be compared in one place.

/windows/aluminum-windows Aluminum Window Replacement Bay Area | Cost & Installation 5
People Also Ask Q1. What is the disadvantage of aluminum windows?
Идея / источник
Реальный PAA-вопрос · seed «aluminum windows» · ответ сгенерирован answer_paa() (факты бренда / цена / локаль)
PAA seed
aluminum windows
Ответ
The main trade-offs of aluminum windows: bare aluminum conducts heat, so frames without thermal breaks lose energy efficiency. Whether that matters depends on the home's exposure and budget, which Deluxe Windows reviews openly.
People Also Ask Q2. Does anyone make aluminum windows anymore?

Реальный PAA-вопрос · seed «aluminum windows» · ответ сгенерирован answer_paa() (факты бренда / цена / локаль)

People Also Ask Q3. What is the lifespan of aluminum windows?
Идея / источник
Реальный PAA-вопрос · seed «aluminum windows» · ответ сгенерирован answer_paa() (факты бренда / цена / локаль)
PAA seed
aluminum windows
Ответ
Aluminum windows and doors typically serve 15-30 years, longer for thermally improved architectural frames. Quality of installation, sun exposure and upkeep move products to either end of that range, so seals and hardware should be checked periodically.
People Also Ask Q4. Is aluminium window better than vinyl?
Идея / источник
Реальный PAA-вопрос · seed «aluminum windows» · ответ сгенерирован answer_paa() (факты бренда / цена / локаль)
PAA seed
aluminum windows
Ответ
Aluminum offers slim sightlines, structural strength and a clean contemporary appearance at mid-range pricing with slim frames that maximize glass area, while vinyl brings low maintenance, good insulation and the widest choice of budget-friendly series and typically lasts 20-40 years. The better fit depends on budget, architecture and how long you plan to keep the home.

Ответ
For aluminum windows, the current promotion prices installations from $549 per window installed (regular $915). The final quote reflects access, removal and finishing, and Deluxe Windows confirms exact installed pricing after measuring.

People Also Ask Q1. What type of window is most energy-efficient?
Идея / источник
Реальный PAA-вопрос · seed «energy efficient windows» · ответ сгенерирован answer_paa() (факты бренда / цена / локаль)
PAA seed
energy efficient windows
Ответ
Energy performance for vinyl comes from the whole unit: frame, Low-E glass, gas fill, spacers and installation. ENERGY STAR certified windows save about 12% on energy bills, and qualifying models may earn the $600 federal 25C tax credit.

People Also Ask Q1. What is a wood clad window?

Реальный PAA-вопрос · seed «wood clad windows» · ответ сгенерирован answer_paa() (факты бренда / цена / локаль)

wood clad windows

Wood Clad windows are built around a wood-clad frame system, chosen for a real-wood interior with a weather-resistant protective exterior shell. In practice the choice covers frame construction, glazing package and finish, all of which Deluxe Windows documents in each product proposal.
People Also Ask Q2. How long do wood clad windows last?
Идея / источник
Реальный PAA-вопрос · seed «wood clad windows» · ответ сгенерирован answer_paa() (факты бренда / цена / локаль)
PAA seed
wood clad windows
Ответ
Wood Clad windows and doors typically serve 30-50 years when the cladding and seals are maintained. Quality of installation, sun exposure and upkeep move products to either end of that range, so seals and hardware should be checked periodically.
People Also Ask Q3. Are wood-clad windows better than vinyl?
Идея / источник
Реальный PAA-вопрос · seed «wood clad windows» · ответ сгенерирован answer_paa() (факты бренда / цена / локаль)
PAA seed
wood clad windows
Ответ
Wood-clad offers a real-wood interior with a weather-resistant protective exterior shell at a premium over bare wood, offset by much lower exterior upkeep, while vinyl brings low maintenance, good insulation and the widest choice of budget-friendly series and typically lasts 20-40 years. The better fit depends on budget, architecture and how long you plan to keep the home.

Anlin has manufactured energy-efficient vinyl windows in Clovis, California since 1990. Deluxe Windows compares verified ratings and installed cost before recommending it.

People Also Ask Q2. Is Marvin better than Andersen?
Идея / источник
Реальный PAA-вопрос · seed «marvin doors» · ответ сгенерирован answer_paa() (факты бренда / цена / локаль)
PAA seed
marvin doors
Ответ
Marvin stands out for premium wood, fiberglass and clad collections such as Essential, Elevate and Ultimate, while Andersen offers collections across Fibrex composite, wood, vinyl and aluminum-clad lines. Neither wins outright: installed Marvin windows usually price between $1,000 and $1,800 each depending on series and glass, so the better pick depends on budget, style and warranty priorities. Deluxe Windows carries both and shows them side by side. Ask about Marvin specifics when booking the free estimate.

Идея / источник

milgard style line series
Ответ
Milgard stands out for vinyl, fiberglass and aluminum families including Trinsic, Tuscany, Style Line and Ultra, while Andersen offers collections across Fibrex composite, wood, vinyl and aluminum-clad lines. Neither wins outright: Milgard windows typically run $350-$1,200 per unit before installation, one of the widest price spans among major brands, so the better pick depends on budget, style and warranty priorities. Deluxe Windows carries both and shows them side by side. Ask about Milgard specifics when booking the free estimate.

/window-type/all-weather-architectural-aluminum-windows All Aluminum | Bay Area Replacement & Installation 5
Сгенерировано (шаблон) Q1. Why choose All Weather Architectural Aluminum Windows for a Bay Area home?
Идея / источник
Шаблон brand+material: почему эта комбинация
Ответ
All Weather Architectural Aluminum Windows combine All Weather Architectural Aluminum's engineering with a balance of appearance, comfort and durability. All Weather Architectural Aluminum builds thermally improved frames suited to modern Bay Area designs, which suits many Bay Area replacement projects.
Сгенерировано (шаблон) Q2. What do All Weather Architectural Aluminum Windows cost installed?
Идея / источник
Шаблон brand+material: цена
Ответ
For All Weather Architectural Aluminum Windows, the current promotion prices installations from $549 per window installed (regular $915). The exact number depends on sizes, glass package and installation conditions, so Deluxe Windows quotes each opening after measuring.
Сгенерировано (шаблон) Q3. Is installation included in the All Weather Architectural Aluminum Windows quote?
Идея / источник
Шаблон brand+material: монтаж в quote
Ответ
Yes — the written quote for All Weather Architectural Aluminum Windows covers product, professional installation, removal of the old units, sealing and haul-away. Optional extras like interior trim work are listed separately so the Bay Area price is transparent.
Сгенерировано (шаблон) Q4. Which series are available for All Weather Architectural Aluminum Windows?
Идея / источник
Шаблон brand+material: доступные серии
Ответ
Available All Weather Architectural Aluminum Windows series change with the manufacturer's current catalog — architectural aluminum windows with slim profiles for large contemporary openings. Deluxe Windows confirms the exact options during the consultation.

Идея / источник
Шаблон brand+material: кто ставит рядом
Ответ
Deluxe Windows measures, orders and installs All Weather Architectural Aluminum Windows throughout the Bay Area from its Burlingame showroom, and verifies operation and weather sealing after installation.

/window-type/anlin-vinyl-windows Anlin Vinyl Windows | Bay Area Replacement & Installation 5
People Also Ask Q1. What are the disadvantages of vinyl windows?
Идея / источник
Реальный PAA-вопрос · seed «vinyl windows» · ответ сгенерирован answer_paa() (факты бренда / цена / локаль)
PAA seed
vinyl windows
Ответ
No brand is perfect: with Anlin Vinyl Windows, review series-level differences in pricing, lead times and hardware. Anlin has manufactured energy-efficient vinyl windows in Clovis, California since 1990. Deluxe Windows flags the honest trade-offs of each series before ordering.
People Also Ask Q2. Which window is better, vinyl or fiberglass?
Идея / источник
Реальный PAA-вопрос · seed «vinyl windows» · ответ сгенерирован answer_paa() (факты бренда / цена / локаль)
PAA seed
vinyl windows
Ответ
The honest comparison depends on priorities: Anlin Vinyl Windows stands out for California-made vinyl replacement windows engineered for West Coast climates, while competitors trade differently on price, warranty and looks. Installed anlin windows in the bay area usually fall in the mid vinyl range, between economy vinyl and premium fiberglass. Deluxe Windows shows both options side by side in the showroom.
People Also Ask Q3. What is the lifespan of a vinyl window?
Идея / источник
Реальный PAA-вопрос · seed «vinyl windows» · ответ сгенерирован answer_paa() (факты бренда / цена / локаль)
PAA seed
vinyl windows
Ответ
Expect Anlin Vinyl Windows products to serve 20-40 years when installed correctly. Anlin's double lifetime warranty is transferable to the next homeowner and covers glass breakage on many series, and Deluxe Windows registers coverage for every installed project.
People Also Ask Q4. Can vinyl windows be repaired?
Идея / источник
Реальный PAA-вопрос · seed «vinyl windows» · ответ сгенерирован answer_paa() (факты бренда / цена / локаль)
PAA seed
vinyl windows
Ответ
Minor anlin vinyl windows issues — hardware, weatherstripping, screens or a fogged glass unit — can often be repaired. Cracked or warped frames and repeated seal failures usually make replacement the more economical fix, which Deluxe Windows assesses honestly on site.
Сгенерировано (шаблон) Q5. Why choose Anlin Vinyl Windows for a Bay Area home?
Идея / источник
Шаблон brand+material: почему эта комбинация
Ответ
Anlin Vinyl Windows combine Anlin's engineering with low maintenance, good insulation and the widest choice of budget-friendly series. Anlin has manufactured energy-efficient vinyl windows in Clovis, California since 1990, which suits many Bay Area replacement projects.

Сгенерировано (шаблон) Q1. Why choose Italwindows Aluminum Windows for a Bay Area home?
Идея / источник
Шаблон brand+material: почему эта комбинация
Ответ
Italwindows Aluminum Windows combine Italwindows's engineering with slim sightlines, structural strength and a clean contemporary appearance. Italwindows focuses on narrow-profile designs for modern and architectural projects, which suits many Bay Area replacement projects.
Сгенерировано (шаблон) Q2. What do Italwindows Aluminum Windows cost installed?
Идея / источник
Шаблон brand+material: цена
Ответ
For Italwindows Aluminum Windows, the current promotion prices installations from $549 per window installed (regular $915). The exact number depends on sizes, glass package and installation conditions, so Deluxe Windows quotes each opening after measuring.
Сгенерировано (шаблон) Q3. Is installation included in the Italwindows Aluminum Windows quote?
Идея / источник
Шаблон brand+material: монтаж в quote
Ответ
Yes — the written quote for Italwindows Aluminum Windows covers product, professional installation, removal of the old units, sealing and haul-away. Optional extras like interior trim work are listed separately so the Bay Area price is transparent.

Идея / источник

People Also Ask Q1. What is the difference between Marvin Signature and Essentials?
Идея / источник
Реальный PAA-вопрос · seed «marvin essential collection» · ответ сгенерирован answer_paa() (факты бренда / цена / локаль)
PAA seed
marvin essential collection
Ответ
The honest comparison depends on priorities: Marvin Fiberglass Windows stands out for premium wood, fiberglass and clad collections such as Essential, Elevate and Ultimate, while competitors trade differently on price, warranty and looks. Installed marvin windows usually price between $1,000 and $1,800 each depending on series and glass. Deluxe Windows shows both options side by side in the showroom.
People Also Ask Q2. Are Marvin Essential windows better than Andersen?
Идея / источник
Реальный PAA-вопрос · seed «marvin essential collection» · ответ сгенерирован answer_paa() (факты бренда / цена / локаль)
PAA seed
marvin essential collection
Ответ
Marvin Fiberglass Windows stands out for premium wood, fiberglass and clad collections such as Essential, Elevate and Ultimate, while Andersen offers collections across Fibrex composite, wood, vinyl and aluminum-clad lines. Neither wins outright: installed Marvin windows usually price between $1,000 and $1,800 each depending on series and glass, so the better pick depends on budget, style and warranty priorities. Deluxe Windows carries both and shows them side by side.

marvin essential collection

Marvin Fiberglass Windows is a solid choice when the series matches the home: the brand offers premium wood, fiberglass and clad collections such as Essential, Elevate and Ultimate. Marvin's Ultrex fiberglass is impact resistant and holds paint and shape in coastal climates. Deluxe Windows compares verified ratings and installed cost before recommending it.

/door-types/simonton-vinyl-doors Simonton Vinyl Doors | Bay Area Replacement & Installation 5
Сгенерировано (шаблон) Q1. Why choose Simonton Vinyl Doors for a Bay Area home?
Идея / источник
Шаблон brand+material: почему эта комбинация
Ответ
Simonton Vinyl Doors pair Simonton's door engineering with low maintenance, good insulation and the widest choice of budget-friendly series. Simonton has been an ENERGY STAR partner since 1999, so the door style is matched to the opening, exposure and security needs of the home.
Сгенерировано (шаблон) Q2. What do Simonton Vinyl Doors cost installed?
Идея / источник
Шаблон brand+material: цена
Ответ
For Simonton Vinyl Doors, the current promotion prices installations from $1299 per door installed (regular $2165). Panel count, glass, hardware and opening preparation set the final number, so Deluxe Windows quotes each door after measuring.
Сгенерировано (шаблон) Q3. How fast can Simonton Vinyl Doors be ordered and installed?
Идея / источник
Шаблон door-type: скорость заказа/монтажа
Ответ
After measuring, Simonton Vinyl Doors typically arrive in four to eight weeks and are installed in about a day per door, including removal of the old unit, sealing and hardware adjustment. The exact Bay Area schedule is confirmed in writing.
Сгенерировано (шаблон) Q4. Which styles are available for Simonton Vinyl Doors?
Идея / источник
Шаблон door-type: стили
Ответ
Simonton Vinyl Doors span entry, sliding, French and multi-panel patio configurations, depending on Simonton's current catalog. Deluxe Windows confirms the exact options during the consultation.
Сгенерировано (шаблон) Q5. Who installs Simonton Vinyl Doors near me?
Идея / источник
Шаблон brand+material: кто ставит рядом
Ответ
Deluxe Windows measures, orders and installs Simonton Vinyl Doors throughout the Bay Area from its Burlingame showroom, and verifies operation and weather sealing after installation.
/door-types/western-window-systems-aluminum-doors Western Aluminum | Bay Area Replacement & Installation 5

Идея / источник
Шаблон brand+material: почему эта комбинация
Ответ
Western Window Systems Aluminum Doors pair Western Window Systems's door engineering with slim sightlines, structural strength and a clean contemporary appearance. Western Window Systems has specialized in indoor-outdoor living products since 1959, so the door style is matched to the opening, exposure and security needs of the home.

Шаблон коллекции: обзор серии

Шаблон коллекции: конфигурации

Сгенерировано (шаблон) Q3. How is installed pricing for All Weather Series 5000 calculated?
Идея / источник
Шаблон коллекции: как считается цена
Ответ
Installed pricing for All Weather Series 5000 reflects opening dimensions, configuration, glass, finish, quantity and access. As a reference, the current promotion prices installations from $549 per window installed (regular $915).
Сгенерировано (шаблон) Q4. How does All Weather Series 5000 compare with other brand collections?
Идея / источник
Шаблон коллекции: сравнение с sibling series
Ответ
Compare All Weather Series 5000 with sibling collections on frame construction, visible glass area, energy ratings, finish options, warranty and installed cost. series availability is confirmed for each Bay Area project.
Сгенерировано (шаблон) Q5. How do I order All Weather Series 5000 with installation?
Идея / источник
Шаблон коллекции: как заказать с монтажом
Ответ
Ordering All Weather Series 5000 starts with a free on-site measurement; Deluxe Windows then quotes the collection installed, places the factory order and schedules the crew, so one contract covers product, installation and warranty registration.

The honest comparison depends on priorities: Milgard V250 Style Line Series stands out for vinyl, fiberglass and aluminum families including Trinsic, Tuscany, Style Line and Ultra, while competitors trade differently on price, warranty and looks. Ответ
Ply Gem West 400 Series is part of Ply Gem's lineup: practical vinyl and aluminum collections across several value levels. Deluxe Windows checks that this collection matches the opening sizes and design goals before recommending it.
Сгенерировано (шаблон) Q2. Which configurations does Ply Gem West 400 Series offer?
Идея / источник
Шаблон коллекции: конфигурации
Ответ
Styles, sizes, glass packages, colors and hardware for Ply Gem West 400 Series depend on the current catalog. Deluxe Windows confirms available configurations for each Bay Area order.
Сгенерировано (шаблон) Q3. How is installed pricing for Ply Gem West 400 Series calculated?
Идея / источник
Шаблон коллекции: как считается цена
Ответ
Installed pricing for Ply Gem West 400 Series reflects opening dimensions, configuration, glass, finish, quantity and access. As a reference, the current promotion prices installations from $499 per window installed (regular $832).
Сгенерировано (шаблон) Q4. How does Ply Gem West 400 Series compare with other Ply Gem collections?
Идея / источник
Шаблон коллекции: сравнение с sibling series
Ответ
Compare Ply Gem West 400 Series with sibling collections on frame construction, visible glass area, energy ratings, finish options, warranty and installed cost. Ply Gem product families cover both replacement and new-construction openings.
Сгенерировано (шаблон) Q5. How do I order Ply Gem West 400 Series with installation?
Идея / источник
Шаблон коллекции: как заказать с монтажом
Ответ
Ordering Ply Gem West 400 Series starts with a free on-site measurement; Deluxe Windows then quotes the collection installed, places the factory order and schedules the crew, so one contract covers product, installation and warranty registration.

Города 160 13 PAA 147 Gen
/window-replacement/alameda Windows & Doors in Alameda, Alameda County 5
Сгенерировано (шаблон) Q1. How much does window replacement cost in Alameda?
Идея / источник
Шаблон города: стоимость замены
Ответ
For Alameda homes, with the current promotion quality vinyl replacement starts at $549 per window installed (regular $915), while fiberglass, clad-wood and architectural products price higher. Deluxe Windows itemizes product, labor and permits in a written Alameda quote after free on-site measurements.
Сгенерировано (шаблон) Q2. Do I need a permit to replace windows in Alameda?
Идея / источник
Шаблон города: разрешение / permit
Ответ
Permitting: Alameda follows standard California permitting, confirmed per project scope. Deluxe Windows verifies requirements with the building department and manages the paperwork for Alameda installations.
Сгенерировано (шаблон) Q3. Which window brands work best for Alameda homes?
Идея / источник
Шаблон города: подходящие бренды
Ответ
Popular choices in Alameda include Milgard, Anlin and Simonton vinyl for value, and Marvin or Andersen for premium projects. The right pick depends on the home's age, style and exposure in Alameda.
Сгенерировано (шаблон) Q4. How long does window replacement take in Alameda?
Идея / источник
Шаблон города: сроки проекта
Ответ
Most Alameda projects are measured in one visit and installed in one to three working days once windows arrive, typically four to eight weeks after ordering.
Сгенерировано (шаблон) Q5. How do I book a free window replacement estimate in Alameda?
Идея / источник
Шаблон города: запись на estimate
Ответ
Call or send the project details online and a Deluxe Windows consultant visits the Alameda home, measures every opening and prepares a written installed quote — the visit is free and there is no obligation to order.

For Alameda County homes, weigh solar control, insulation, air leakage and frame durability against the local microclimate. Coastal, hillside and inland Alameda County homes often need different glass packages.

Сгенерировано (шаблон) Q5. How do I schedule window installation in Santa Clara County?
Идея / источник
Шаблон округа: запись на монтаж
Ответ
Request a free estimate and a Deluxe Windows consultant measures the Santa Clara County home, prepares an installed quote and books the crew once products arrive — most Santa Clara County installations finish within one to three working days.
/county-hub-pages/solano-county Windows & Doors in Solano County 5

Сгенерировано (шаблон) Q2. What does window replacement cost in Solano County?
Идея / источник
Шаблон округа: стоимость
Ответ
Across Solano County, with the current promotion quality vinyl replacement starts at $549 per window installed (regular $915), while fiberglass, clad-wood and architectural products price higher. Quotes are prepared per address because access, permits and product mix differ between Solano County cities.

/blog/do-energy-efficient-windows-and-doors-make-a-difference-for-bay-area-homeowners Do Energy-Efficient Windows Work? | Savings & Tax Credit 4
People Also Ask Q1. Do energy-efficient windows really make a difference?
Идея / источник
Реальный PAA-вопрос · seed «energy efficient windows» · ответ сгенерирован answer_paa() (факты бренда / цена / локаль)
PAA seed
energy efficient windows
Ответ
Yes — ENERGY STAR certified windows cut energy bills by about 12% on average, and models meeting the Most Efficient criteria can qualify for the $600 federal 25C tax credit. Comfort gains near windows are usually noticeable immediately.

/blog/how-long-do-windows-last How Long Do Windows Last? | Lifespan by Material 5
People Also Ask Q1. How often should windows be replaced?
Идея / источник
Реальный PAA-вопрос · seed «how long do windows last» · ответ сгенерирован answer_paa() (факты бренда / цена / локаль)
PAA seed
how long do windows last
Ответ
Vinyl windows typically last 20-40 years, fiberglass 30-50, wood 30+ with upkeep and aluminum 15-30. Plan a replacement review once units pass the 20-year mark or show failed seals, drafts or fogged glass.
